description: Capability for the iOS build (S13, docs/design-explorations/s13-ios-blueprint.md, §D3/§2/§6 F3/F6) — core defaults + BYOK-provider HTTP access mirrored from capabilities/default.json (still apply on iOS, §5 owner-gate 5), opener:allow-open-url for openExternal.ts's IS_TAURI path (§6 F6), and the os-speech plugin's listener permissions so addPluginListener()/unregister() (plugin:os-speech|register_listener / |remove_listener, §2) aren't silently denied. platforms scopes this OUT of desktop builds (tauri-build's own validate_capabilities skips a capability entirely when the current target isn't in its platforms list — verified against tauri-build 2.6.3's acl.rs), so it has zero effect on the macOS build capabilities/default.json already covers.
